title: ophrys × neocamusii
intro: Ophrys × neocamusii, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a hybrid plant species derived from the cross between Ophrys speculum and Ophrys tenthredifera. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ophrys × neocamusii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Ophrys × neocamusii can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
